title: BZR4 Tachometer PCB
summary: Designed and built a custom tachometer PCB for the BZR4 racecar using a CH32V003 microcontroller. It drives a shift-register LED array for real-time RPM visualization, improving driver feedback on the track.
highlights: Optimized embedded C firmware for low-latency LED updates.
Integrated with CAN bus for vehicle telemetry.

title: AI Rover — Nav2 + YDLIDAR
summary: Developed an autonomous rover capable of indoor navigation and obstacle avoidance using ROS2 Nav2. Integrated a YDLIDAR sensor for real-time SLAM and map generation.
highlights: Configured Nav2 stack for differential drive kinematics.
Achieved reliable point-to-point navigation in unstructured environments.

title: LYRA-Style Terminal Assistant
summary: Created an AI-powered terminal assistant to automate complex workflows and shell commands. Features context-aware suggestions and local execution capabilities.
highlights: Integrated with modern LLM APIs for natural language to shell command translation.
Built robust error handling and safety confirmation prompts.
Packaged as a simple CLI tool for daily use.
